zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath於1290年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾林頓時，他的父親Sir Walter de Sommerville of Linton and Carnwath30歲，母親Giles Herring25歲。他於大約1324年與Lady Elizabeth Douglas在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾林頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1372年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯享年82歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath was born in 1290, in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walter de Sommerville of Linton and Carnwath, was 30 and his mother, Giles Herring, was 25. He married Lady Elizabeth Douglas about 1324, in Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1372, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath est né en 1290, à Linton, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Walter de Sommerville of Linton and Carnwath, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Giles Herring, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Douglas environ 1324, à Linton, Valle de Twede, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1372, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Melrose, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath 1290 in Linton, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter de Sommerville of Linton and Carnwath 30 und seine Mutter Giles Herring 25. Er hat um 1324 in Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland Lady Elizabeth Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1372 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Melrose, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwathが1290年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Walter de Sommerville of Linton and Carnwathは30歳，母Giles Herringは25歳であった。約1324年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアリントンでLady Elizabeth Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1372年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスで82歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースメルローゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath(이)가 1290년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter de Sommerville of Linton and Carnwath(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Giles Herring(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1324년 스컷랜드 피블레실르 린턴에서 Lady Elizabeth Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1372년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath nasceu em 1290, em Linton, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Walter de Sommerville of Linton and Carnwath, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Giles Herring, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Douglas aproximadamente 1324, em Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath родился в 1290 г. в местности линтон, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Walter de Sommerville of Linton and Carnwath было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Giles Herring, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Douglas около 1324 г. в местности линтон, пиблессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1372 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Douglas aproximadamente 1324, en Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1372, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Melrose, Scottish Borders, Escocia, Reino Unido.
